title: CricketStudio Knowledge Graph — Sample
subtitle: Cricket knowledge graph: all 10 IPL franchises, player attributes, batter-vs-bowler matchups
description: A public sample of the CricketStudio cricket knowledge graph: all 10 IPL 2026 franchises and their players, with batter-vs-bowler matchup relationships (IPL 2026 + IPL-career head-to-head). 256 entities, 6,861 typed relationships (plays_for, faced, dismissed_by). Player nodes include role, battingHandedness, bowlingStyle, nationality, and leagues[] coverage flags from CricketStudio's Wave 1+2 player-type backfill. Every node carries a canonical_url back to https://players.cricketstudio.ai. Slug-keyed; no internal ids; no external-ID crosswalk. Full graph is API-gated. Files: nodes.json/csv, edges.json/csv, schema.json. License CC-BY 4.0.
